compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for generate-skill-eval.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write a comprehensive test suite for the generate-skill-eval.sh script that will be created in the GREEN task. All tests must fail (RED) since the script does not exist yet.

Test file: tests/scripts/test-generate-skill-eval.sh

Test approach: Each test creates a temporary skill directory with a crafted SKILL.md, runs generate-skill-eval.sh, and asserts on exit code, stderr messages, and output file contents/structure.

## Tests to Write

1. test_happy_path_frontmatter: valid skill with frontmatter description field → generates YAML with providers, tests, TODO llm-rubric assertions
2. test_happy_path_h2: valid skill with H2 section (no frontmatter) → generates correct YAML
3. test_error_nonexistent_skill: non-existent skill directory → exits 1, stderr includes skill name and "not found"
4. test_error_no_description: SKILL.md with neither frontmatter description nor H2 → exits 1, stderr includes "no parseable description"
5. test_error_existing_config: evals/promptfooconfig.yaml already exists → exits 1, stderr includes "already exists"
6. test_fence_aware_h2: code block containing "## Fake H2" line → extraction ignores it, extracts real H2 content
7. test_yaml_escaping: SKILL.md description with colons, quotes, newlines → YAML output properly escapes them, round-trips through python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open(...))"
8. test_atomic_write: verify temp file pattern (output written to temp then mv'd; no partial file on error path)
9. test_help_flag: --help outputs usage and exits 0
10. test_structural_validity: generated YAML has top-level providers: and tests: keys (matches _validate_config expectations)

## TDD Requirement

All tests must fail initially. The test file must be runnable via `bash tests/scripts/test-generate-skill-eval.sh` and produce FAIL results.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-generate-skill-eval.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-generate-skill-eval.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 10 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-generate-skill-eval.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED) since generate-skill-eval.sh does not exist yet
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-generate-skill-eval.sh 2>/dev/null

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-generate-skill-eval.sh. Tests: 10 behavioral RED tests, all failing as expected (PASSED: 1, FAILED: 21).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests for generate-skill-eval.sh — 10 behavioral test blocks, all intentionally failing (RED phase)
